acceptance_criteria: At least 20 new execution-verified both-miss rows are required for a pass.
Every accepted row must have a hack diff SHA256, official report hash, and raw source traceability.
Duplicate seed instances must not be counted as new.
Cloud resources must be deleted before publication.
The result must not claim a released benchmark, leaderboard, model superiority, state-of-the-art result, or natural reward-hacking frequency.
falsifiers: The gate must fail if fewer than 20 new execution-verified both-miss rows are produced.
The gate must fail if any accepted row lacks a hack diff hash, official report hash, or source traceability.
The gate must fail if any counted row duplicates reward_hack_seed_v0.
The gate must fail if cloud resources remain undeleted after the run.
The gate must fail if it claims a released benchmark, leaderboard, model superiority, state-of-the-art result, or natural reward-hacking frequency.
stated_goal: Grow the validated reward-hack seed by at least 20 new execution-verified both-miss rows under official execution, bounded spend, and strict claim boundaries.
